div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Entrata Sr. L&D Partner JD
= 3 Full-Time Jobs Bundled Into 1 Role
Solo operator + 1 teammate (Sayali)
for 900+ employees

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
JOB 1
eLearning Developer
Design + Build Courses

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
JOB 2
LMS Administrator
Platform + Data Operations

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
JOB 3
L&D Partner / Manager
Strategy + Facilitation + Culture

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 1: Training Needs Analysis
Interview SMEs, define objectives,
align to business outcome
~10% of total time

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step 2: Storyboarding
Screen-by-screen script,
visuals, interactions,
audio narration, assessments
~25 to 30% of total time

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 3: Development
Build in Storyline / Captivate / Rise
custom interactions, variables,
triggers, JavaScript, animation
~40 to 50% of total time

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 4: Media Production
Graphics, audio recording,
video editing in Camtasia,
AI voice via Murf / ElevenLabs,
AI video via Synthesia / HeyGen

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 5: QA and Accessibility
WCAG 2.1 AA check, keyboard nav,
colour contrast, screen reader
~10 to 15% of total time

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 6: SCORM / xAPI packaging
Test in SCORM Cloud or Veracity LRS
before pushing to LMS

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 7: Stakeholder Review
Iterate 2 to 3 rounds of feedback
with SMEs and business

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INDUSTRY BENCHMARK (ATD / Chapman)
Per 1 hour of finished eLearning:
Level 1 basic = ~49 hours
Level 2 standard = ~127 hours
Level 3 advanced = ~184 to 267 hours
Level 4 immersive = ~500+ hours

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
REALITY: A single 30-min Level 3 course
= ~100 hours = ~13 working days
by ONE dedicated developer

div.style: color: rgb(44, 62, 80) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OPEN QUESTIONS for Entrata:
Do they already use Storyline /
Captivate / Rise / Camtasia /
Synthesia / HeyGen?
If NO - procurement + change mgmt
is itself a 3 to 6 month project

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LMS Platform Administration
User provisioning, enrolments,
role-based access, group mgmt

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Course Deployment
Upload SCORM / xAPI packages,
version control, metadata,
taxonomy, content library upkeep

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compliance Tracking
POSH, data privacy, security,
code of conduct - enrol all employees,
track completion, chase stragglers,
audit-ready reports

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Learning Analytics Dashboards
Participation, completion rates,
scores, drop-off points,
feedback aggregation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
xAPI / LRS Integration
Capture behavioural statements
beyond pass / fail -
Veracity LRS, SCORM Cloud,
Learning Locker

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Vendor Management
LMS contracts, renewals,
e-learning content library vendors
(LinkedIn Learning, Coursera, Udemy),
authoring tool licenses

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reporting to Business and HR
Monthly dashboards, exec summaries,
compliance certifications,
global process alignment with US

div.style: color: rgb(44, 62, 80) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OPEN QUESTIONS for Entrata:
Which LMS do they use?
Is there a dedicated LMS admin today?
Who manages compliance tracking?
Do they have an LRS?
Who owns vendor contracts?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Strategic TNA and Skill Gap Analysis
Partner with Engineering, Product,
HR, Business leaders
to identify capability needs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Program Design and Ownership
Onboarding, manager enablement,
leadership development, culture,
AI literacy, communication skills

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Instructor-Led Facilitation
Deliver or co-deliver live sessions,
virtual workshops, manager 101,
accessibility awareness, AI productivity

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SME Coordination
Onboard SMEs to deliver tech training,
teach them ID basics,
coordinate logistics and schedules

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Change Management and Adoption
Support rollout of new tools,
processes, ways of working,
run internal comms campaigns

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Culture and Manager Enablement
Engagement programs,
values reinforcement,
first-time manager bootcamps,
performance conversations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Impact Measurement
Kirkpatrick Levels 1 to 4,
ROI reports, business outcome linkage,
continuous improvement loops

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stakeholder Management
Weekly syncs with Engineering leads,
quarterly reviews with HR and Business,
global alignment with US L&D

div.style: color: rgb(44, 62, 80) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OPEN QUESTIONS for Entrata:
Who owns strategic L&D today?
Is there a Head of L&D above me?
Which programs already exist?
What is the budget and headcount plan?
